race.comment: ROSA KISS (3) put in a career-best performance finishing second at Doomben when resuming and should find this assignment a touch easier. Has since revved up for this with a dominant trial win and can go one better against this line-up. I SAY I SAY (6) has placed two of four over this distance range and looks to be improving with racing. Should play a role in the outcome from the low draw. CAMBRIDGE BAY (1) is unlucky to still be a maiden placing in all three outings when last in work and this is not an overly strong affair. Watch for him late in the piece. PHOENIX LEGEND (2) strips fitter second-up from the break and may earn some minor money. RANGER'S PRIDE (13) hails from an astute stable and should be kept safe on debut.
